subcodes.first_line: We make mention of one who hath found the sweetness of the utterance of his Lord, the All-Merciful, with an illumined heart. The world hath been perfumed through the wafting fragrances of revelation, yet [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا نذکر من وجد حلاوه بیان ربه الرحمن بقلب منیر قد تعطر العالم من نفحات الوحی ولکن
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @knowledge; recognition of God
